title: ModuleRebuildRequest
description: Request to rebuild a module with new source code changes

module_name.description: Name of the module to rebuild (e.g., 'wireframe-ai-adapter-rust')

reason.description: Reason for the rebuild (e.g., 'Selfdev: agent modified its own code')

source_changes.description: List of source files that were modified

path.description: Relative path to the modified file

change_type.description: Type of change made to the file

requested_by.description: Identifier of who requested the rebuild (e.g., 'agent-123' or 'user')

rollback_on_failure.description: Whether to rollback to previous binary on build failure
